ogTitle: Yinkanie vs Yorke Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yinkanie and Yorke Valley.
heading: Yinkanie vs Yorke Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yinkanie, South Australia and Yorke Valley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yorke Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Yinkanie (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yinkanie or Yorke Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yinkanie has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Yorke Valley scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yinkanie scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Yorke Valley scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yinkanie or Yorke Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yorke Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
